hooks.commandWindows: if (Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { python "$env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT\hooks\session_start.py" } elseif (Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { py -3 "$env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT\hooks\session_start.py" }

if (Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { python "$env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT\hooks\user_prompt_submit.py" } elseif (Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { py -3 "$env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT\hooks\user_prompt_submit.py" }

if (Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { python "$env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT\hooks\pre_compact.py" } elseif (Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { py -3 "$env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT\hooks\pre_compact.py" }

if (Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { python "$env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT\hooks\stop.py" } elseif (Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { py -3 "$env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT\hooks\stop.py" }
